entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A major cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) grown in the arid zone of northwestern India

entities.name: ARID ZONE OF NORTHWESTERN INDIA
entities.description: A unique adaptation zone characterized by severe moisture stress and high temperatures

entities.name: SEVERE MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A pervasive environmental stressor in the arid zone of northwestern India

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURES
entities.description: A pervasive environmental stressor in the arid zone of northwestern India

entities.name: HYBRID CULTIVARS
entities.description: Varieties of pearl millet that have gained widespread acceptance elsewhere but are not adopted in the arid zone

entities.name: TRADITIONAL LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of pearl millet specifically adapted to the arid zone

entities.name: YIELD ADVANTAGE
entities.description: The increase in productivity associated with hybrids, which is not expressed in the arid zone

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, collaborating on pearl millet research

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: Indian Council of Agricultural Research, collaborating on pearl millet research

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic resources of pearl millet managed by farmers in the arid zone

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of producing well-adapted new varieties and hybrids
